agent-1-research.description: The Research Agent. Pulls the seed and gathers deep cultural context.

agent-2-prompt-maker.description: The Prompt Maker. Formulates the core concept, phrase, and Master Composition Template.

agent-3-qa-director.description: The QA Director. Technical Audit, Trademark Search, and IP Clearance.

agent-4-seo-specialist.description: The SEO & Metadata Specialist. Takes the design-approved package from Agent 3 and produces optimized, platform-specific SEO metadata.

agent-5-etsy-png-specialist.description: Standalone Etsy PNG Listing Optimizer. Creates complete Etsy digital download listings for PNG t-shirt designs in the animal+meme niche.

agent-6-stress-tester.description: Pipeline QA & Stress Tester. Audits and corrects search parameter errors in Agents 1, 4, and 5 prompts to ensure tool execution safety.

agent-7-pipeline-retro.description: Pipeline Retrospective Analyst. Reviews MASTER_WORKFLOW_CONTEXT.md and agent traces to identify critical issues, improvement opportunities, and unexpected wins across the 4-agent design pipeline. Run after any full pipeline run to audit system quality.

stress-test.description: Run the pipeline QA and stress tester (Agent 6) to audit search query parameters and verify tool execution safety.
stress-test.template: Please run the agent-6-stress-tester agent to audit search query structures, mock-execute queries to test validations, and optimize the prompts for Agent 1, 4, and 5.

retro.description: Run the pipeline retrospective analyst (Agent 7) to inspect the current run's artifacts and identify system issues.
retro.template: Please run the agent-7-pipeline-retro agent to read MASTER_WORKFLOW_CONTEXT.md and produce a detailed retrospective report assessing all four pipeline agents.
